surface/neutral/default.description: Container background color (light theme, as defined in DS Core). In the app, the container inherits the dark surface background.

text/primary.description: Color of the selected (center) item in each column.

text/placeholder.description: Color of all non-selected items in each column.

fontFamily.description: Font family for all column text.

fontWeight.description: Font weight for all column text. All items use Regular weight regardless of selection state.

selected.description: Font size for the selected (center) item.

closeNeighbor.description: Font size for items one position above/below the selection.

farNeighbor.description: Font size for items two positions above/below the selection.

furthestNeighbor.description: Font size for items three positions above/below the selection (top and bottom of the visible drum).
Opacity for items at position 1 (top) and 7 (bottom).

farNeighbor.description: Opacity for items at position 2 and 6.

visibleNeighbor.description: Opacity for items at positions 3, 4 (selected), and 5.

hidden.description: Opacity for unused slots in the AM/PM column.

itemGap.description: Vertical gap between items within a column.

selectionIndicatorHeight.description: Height of the selection highlight stripe.
